steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Next.js 15 App Router, Tailwind CSS v4, strict TypeScript, Vitest smoke test, and ESLint flat layer guards scaffolded.

steps.name: core-types
steps.summary: Type-only domain models and ports added for transactions, statements, CSV mapping, tier gating, analysis responses, and repositories.

steps.name: db-migrations
steps.summary: Initial Supabase SQL migration added with six RLS-protected tables, required unique keys, cascade FKs, and save_statement_analysis RPC.
